title: [Epic] GNC sensor suite upgrade — attitude accuracy and GPS reliability
text:
Epic KES-089. Reporter: Sam Dreher (Nav/GNC Software Lead). Assignee: Sam Dreher. Status: In Progress. Priority: High. Created: 2024-11-15.

Description: Flight test campaign phase 1 (DOC-467) identified two GNC sensor deficiencies requiring hardware changes:

1. IMU vibration error: The ICM-42688-P (P-1092) attitude estimation error reaches 2.1° roll during high-vibration low-speed flight. This violates the 0.5° requirement in DOC-455 (GNC ICD). Root cause: MEMS resonant frequency at 4.8kHz coincides with motor harmonics from P-1041 at mid-throttle. Fix: replace with ADIS16505-2 (P-1093) — approved in ECR-228/ECN-326.

2. GPS reliability: Patch antenna (P-1097) loses reliable sky view at roll angles >15°, causing GPS dropout events (see KES-091 for sub-stories). Fix: replace with helical L1/L2/L5 antenna (P-1098).

Sub-stories: KES-091 (IMU replacement qualification), KES-098 (GPS performance verification).

Design review: WIKI-067 (GNC Sensor Suite Design Review, 2024-12-03).
